channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump shares video of himself at Mount Rushmore before remarks
item.description: President Donald Trump started a weekend of celebrations for America's 250th birthday with a speech at Mount Rushmore on Friday.

item.title: Video: How Chicago begins its July 4th festivities
item.description: A preview of Chicago's countdown to the July 4th celebration at Navy Pier.

item.title: Disney Celebrates America: Live Updates from Inside Statue of Liberty
item.description: ABC marks America's 250th anniversary with 24 hours of special programming called "Disney Celebrates America."

item.title: Trump Warns of 'Communist Menace' in July 4th Speech
item.description: The president began the 250th anniversary of July 4th with a patriotic speech at Mount Rushmore, warning of a resurgence in communism.
